name: water bottles
description: Rinse and remove cap before placing in recycling bin.

name: milk bottles
description: Rinse thoroughly to remove dairy residue before recycling.

name: shampoo bottles
description: Empty completely and rinse before recycling.

name: detergent bottles
description: Rinse out any remaining product before recycling.

name: yogurt pots
description: Scrape clean and rinse before placing in recycling.

name: takeaway plastic containers
description: Wash and dry before recycling if not too greasy.

name: plastic food trays
description: Remove any food residue and rinse before recycling.

name: carrier bags
description: Take to supermarket collection points for recycling.

name: plastic bottle
description: Crush to save space and replace cap before recycling.

name: plastic bag
description: Return to store collection bins, not household recycling.

name: food wrapper
description: Check recycling symbol; most go in general waste.

name: plastic straw
description: Too small for recycling; dispose in general waste.

name: plastic container
description: Rinse clean and check for recycling symbol before disposal.

name: fruit peels
description: Add to food waste bin or home compost pile.

name: vegetable scraps
description: Place in food caddy; great for composting.

name: eggshells
description: Crush and add to compost or food waste bin.

name: tea bags
description: Check if plastic-free; compostable ones go in food waste.

name: coffee grounds
description: Excellent for compost; add directly to food waste.

name: leftover rice
description: Place in food waste bin; avoid leaving at room temperature.

name: bread scraps
description: Add to food waste bin or compost heap.

name: spoiled food leftovers
description: Remove packaging and place food in food waste bin.

name: banana peel
description: Chop up for faster composting in food waste bin.

name: apple core
description: Add to food waste bin or backyard compost.

name: soft drink bottles
description: Rinse and remove cap; place in glass recycling bin.

name: sauce jars
description: Rinse well and remove metal lid before recycling.

name: jam jars
description: Wash out sticky residue and recycle separately from lid.

name: pickle jars
description: Rinse thoroughly and recycle; lid goes in metal bin.

name: oil bottles
description: Wipe out excess oil; small amounts okay for recycling.

name: vinegar bottles
description: Rinse and recycle with other glass items.

name: glass food jars
description: Clean and remove labels if possible before recycling.

name: perfume bottles
description: Remove spray pump and recycle glass part only.

name: glass jar
description: Rinse clean; no need to remove paper labels.

name: wine bottle
description: Empty and rinse; cork goes in general waste.

name: glass container
description: Rinse and place in glass recycling; no ceramics.

name: aluminium drink cans
description: Rinse and crush to save space in recycling bin.

name: steel food tins
description: Rinse out food residue; labels can stay on.

name: aerosol cans
description: Ensure completely empty; do not puncture before recycling.

name: aluminium foil
description: Scrunch into a ball and ensure it's clean before recycling.

name: aluminium takeaway trays
description: Wash off food and scrunch before recycling.

name: metal jar lids
description: Place loose in recycling bin with other metals.

name: biscuit tins
description: Empty and recycle; great for metal recycling.

name: pet food cans
description: Rinse well to avoid smells and recycle with metals.

name: tin can
description: Rinse and place in recycling; can crush to save space.

name: drink can
description: Rinse briefly and crush flat before recycling.

name: metal lid
description: Collect loose lids together for easier recycling.

name: newspapers
description: Keep dry and bundle together for paper recycling.

name: magazines
description: Recycle with paper; glossy pages are usually fine.

name: cardboard delivery boxes
description: Flatten and remove tape before recycling.

name: cereal boxes
description: Flatten and recycle; remove plastic liner first.

name: office paper
description: Recycle loose; remove staples and paperclips.

name: envelopes
description: Recycle with paper; plastic windows are usually okay.

name: toilet roll tubes
description: Flatten and add to paper recycling bin.

name: paper shopping bags
description: Reuse or recycle with other paper products.

name: newspaper
description: Stack neatly and keep dry for recycling.

name: cardboard box
description: Break down flat and remove any plastic tape.

name: paper bag
description: Reuse for food waste or recycle with paper.

name: magazine
description: Recycle whole; no need to remove staples.
